# Skybridge Title

> Skybridge Title, LLC is a title and escrow company in North Miami, Florida, serving Miami-Dade County. We handle residential real estate closings — title search, title insurance, and settlement — in plain language, in English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, and French, with no hidden fees.

Skybridge Title makes buying or selling a home safe and clear for first-time buyers, sellers, realtors, and lenders. We are a Florida-licensed title insurance agency (License #W855791) and BBB accredited. Our tagline is "Closing made clear."

## Key facts
- Location: 655 NE 125th St, Ste A, North Miami, FL
- Phone: 1 (888) 336-0902
- Languages: English, Espanol, Kreyol, Francais
- Services: title insurance, escrow and settlement, residential real estate closings, instant closing-cost quotes, 24/7 multilingual front desk
- Area served: Miami-Dade County, including North Miami, Aventura, Miami Gardens, and Hialeah
- License: Florida Title Insurance Agency #W855791

## Who we help
- Home buyers and sellers who want a clear, plain-language closing in their own language
- Realtors and mortgage brokers who need fast, reliable, bilingual closings (Featured Partner program)
- Lenders and loan officers ordering title

## Guides
- What does a title company actually do?
- Closing costs in Florida, explained
- Buying your first home in Miami: a checklist

## Actions
- Instant closing-cost quote: https://www.skybridgetitle.com/#calculator
- Open a title order: https://www.skybridgetitle.com/
- Become a featured partner: https://www.skybridgetitle.com/#partners
- Contact: https://www.skybridgetitle.com/#contact
